evals.prompt: Create a level 0 Context DFD for our Food Delivery App. It interacts with Customers, Restaurants, and a third-party Payment Gateway.
evals.expected_output: Context level Data Flow Diagram using Mermaid or structured text.
expectations: Identifies the core system as a single process (Level 0)
Includes external entities: Customer, Restaurant, Payment Gateway
Shows data flows between entities and the main system
Uses Mermaid syntax (graph TD or sequenceDiagram if adapted) or clear structured text

evals.prompt: Draw a Level 1 DFD for the 'Process Order' function. Data stores include 'Orders DB' and 'Inventory DB'.
evals.expected_output: Level 1 DFD showing internal processes and data stores.
expectations: Breaks down the system into sub-processes
Includes data stores (Orders DB, Inventory DB)
Shows data flows between processes, data stores, and external entities
Follows standard DFD notation mapping (Process, Data Store, Data Flow, External Entity)
